mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pg_operational_snapshot (instance_id,source,category,event_type,severity,database_name,user_name,object_name, query_id,sql_state,message,fingerprint,payload,sensitive_redacted,event_time,collected_at) VALUES
(#{instanceId},#{it.source},#{it.category},#{it.eventType},#{it.severity}, #{it.databaseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.queryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.sqlState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{it.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{it.fingerprint},CAST(#{it.payloadJson} AS jsonb),#{it.sensitiveRedacted}, to_timestamp(#{it.eventTimeMillis}/1000.0),now())
ON CONFLICT (instance_id,fingerprint) DO UPDATE SET source=EXCLUDED.source,category=EXCLUDED.category,event_type=EXCLUDED.event_type, severity=EXCLUDED.severity,database_name=EXCLUDED.database_name,user_name=EXCLUDED.user_name, object_name=EXCLUDED.object_name,query_id=EXCLUDED.query_id,sql_state=EXCLUDED.sql_state, message=EXCLUDED.message,payload=EXCLUDED.payload, sensitive_redacted=EXCLUDED.sensitive_redacted,event_time=EXCLUDED.event_time,collected_at=now()
